---
title: "Peter Amerkhanian"
title-prefix: "Peter Amerkhanian"
pagetitle: "Home"
image: profile_backup.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 8em
  image-shape : round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/peteramerkhanian/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/peter-amerkhanian
    - icon: envelope-open-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:peteramerkhanian@berkeley.edu
---
<p style="font-weight: 650; color: #4d4d4d">Data Scientist/Policy Analyst    
UC Berkeley MPP '23, BA '16
</p>
<hr>
Check out my:      

- [Work](projects.qmd) -- professional reports, dashboards, and software I've worked on over the years.

- [Tutorials](blog.qmd) -- walkthroughs and informal notes on topics in data analysis.
